hero.instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the background image covers the entire viewport, and the dark overlay has enough opacity for the heading to be perfectly legible. DO NOT USE Inter. Use Playfair Display for headings.

navbar.instructions_to_main_agent: Make the navbar sticky to the top. Smooth scroll navigation for anchor links if on the same page, otherwise standard routing.

menu_cards.instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn Card component for Menu items. Customize it to have rounded-2xl and a subtle hover effect.

buttons.primary: bg-[#B48256] hover:bg-[#8E5E3D] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-[#B48256] text-[#B48256] hover:bg-[#B48256] hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-colors

testimonials.instructions_to_main_agent: Use a staggered entry animation for the cards. Make sure to display 3 cards in a grid on large screens.

floating_whatsapp.style: bg-green-500 hover:bg-green-600 text-white rounded-full p-4 shadow-xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center
floating_whatsapp.instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a fixed floating button that stays at the bottom right. Use the MessageCircle icon or similar from lucide-react.

pages_structure.name: Menu
sections: Categories (Tabs or Sections: Hot Drinks, Cold Drinks, Snacks, Desserts)

pages_structure.name: Gallery
sections: Masonry Grid of Cafe Images (Use framer-motion for staggered reveal)

pages_structure.name: Contact
sections: Google Maps (Embed map for Phagwara generic location)

accessibility_and_testing.contrast_check: Ensure #FFFFFF text over #1F1916 background meets AAA standards. Use adequate text shadows on hero overlay if needed.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rule: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
